error.title: Error

http.403: You are not authorized to access this page.
http.404: The requested page could not be found.
http.405: The HTTP method used is not supported for this URL.
http.500: An internal server error has occurred.

error.concurrencyFailure: This data was modified by another user while you were editing it. Your changes have been rejected.
error.validation: A validation error occurred on the server.
